name: NETSTREIT Corp.
business: NETSTREIT Corp. acquires, owns, and manages a diversified portfolio of single-tenant commercial retail properties subject to long-term net leases with high-credit-quality tenants across the United States. It also invests in property developments and mortgage loans secured by real estate. The company focuses on tenants in industries where a physical location is critical to sales and profits, particularly necessity goods and essential services in retail sectors such as grocers, convenience stores, discount stores, home improvement, quick-service restaurants, general retail, and auto parts.
sellsTo: retail tenants in necessity goods and essential services

exposures.sentence: We believe these characteristics make our tenants businesses e-commerce resistant and resilient through all economic cycles.

Any material failure, weakness, interruption, or breach in security of our information systems or data, or those of the third parties with whom we work, could prevent us from effectively operating our business.

catalysts.event: Physical settlement of forward sale agreements from July 2025 follow-on offering
catalysts.sentence: We expect to physically settle the forward sale agreements (by delivery of shares of common stock) and receive proceeds from the sale of those shares upon one or more forward settlement dates, which shall occur no later than July 28, 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of remaining three property developments and rent commencement
catalysts.sentence: The remaining three developments are expected to be substantially completed with rent commencing at various points throughout 2026.

catalysts.event: Delayed draw availability for $100.0 million under 2032 Term Loan
catalysts.sentence: The remaining $100.0 million is available as a delayed draw term loan commitment until September 25, 2026.
